name: Chunky Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix together cookie crumbs, butter, and salt. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Chill while making the filling.
3. For the filling: With an electric mixer, beat together cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Blend in sour cream. Add eggs and vanilla extract, then blend until well mixed and smooth. Stir in 1 cup chocolate chunks.
4. Pour the filling into the springform pan with the chilled crust. Smooth the top using a spatula.
5. Sprinkle the remaining chocolate chunks on top of the cheesecake.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes. Turn off the oven and leave the cheesecake in for an additional hour.
7. Remove from the oven and chill until firm, about 3-4 hours.
Yield: 1 9-inch cheesecake
